description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:4.4.4 Docker image. Add a job named pages (running in the default stage) that caches the node_modules/ directory, publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. In the pages job run the exact commands: npm install hexo-cli -g, npm install, and hexo deploy. This configuration deploys a Hexo‑generated site to GitLab Pages.
